growth likely rebounded October, with wages expected have recorded their largest annual gain 9-1/2 years, pointing further labour market tightening that could encourage Federal Reserve raise interest rates again December.
Labour Department's closely watched monthly employment report Friday also expected show unemployment rate steady 49-year cent.
Sustained labour market strength could ease fears about economy's health following weak housing data stalling business spending, reports Reuters.
Payrolls rose 134,000 jobs September, smallest gain year, after Hurricane Florence drenched North South Carolina, weighing restaurant retail employment.
anticipated bounce back growth likely tempered some what Hurricane Michael, which struck Florida Panhandle mid-October.
"The employment report should help calm some concerns that economy slowing more quickly than really economy really good shape," said Ryan Sweet, senior economist Moody's Analytics Westchester, Pennsylvania.
Average hourly earnings forecast rising cent October after advancing cent September. This would boost annual increase wages cent, biggest gain since April 2009, from cent September.
Strong annual wage growth would mirror other data published this week showing wages salaries rising third quarter most since mid-2008. Hourly compensation also increased brisk pace third quarter.
Firming wages support views that inflation will hover around Fed's cent target while. personal consumption expenditures price index excluding volatile food energy components increased cent five straight months.
expected raise rates meeting next Wednesday, economists believe strong labour market data could central bank signal increase December. raised borrowing costs September third time this year.

It's continuation trend they have seen over last several years.
"It's been almost three years nothing above normal temperatures most part," Zierden told Bradenton Herald phone inteview Monday.
noted that last consecutive months have been warmer than what considered normal.
Tampa weather stations showing record warm ranking, according second tweet from Zierden.
According Florida Climate Center, average temperature Tampa during November 72.1 degrees, three degrees warmer than normal.
Most state exhibited similar, trend.
"All that consistent with what other parts world have seen what expect with climate change, would certainly think climate change fingerprints recent trend above-normal temperatures," Zierden said.
Manatee County, there were nine record-setting high temperatures through November, according NCEI daily weather records. days through November tied record- high temperatures.
However, Zierden cautioned, just because average temperatures have been warmer doesn't mean Florida won't cold snaps this winter.
Across country, it's been above-average year temperatures, report from National Centers Environmental Information shows.
year-to-date U.S. average temperature, 56.4 degrees, third warmest record. That's 2.61 degrees above 20th century average, according NCEI.
warmest year record U.S. 2012, when average temperature through November 57.04 degrees, NCEI archives show.
Spectrum News Meteorologist Josh Linker said average temperatures will likely remain above average least through Christmas, just couple degrees each day. Temperatures, however, return average last days year.
Linker said December currently averaging less than degree above normal, part recent week cooler weather.

original text:
Gingerbread scones those things that really overlooked. mean, I'll first person admit that I've never been scone person. know they make great on-the-go breakfast busy days, always thought they would taste little boring. Then, made these Gingerbread Scones holiday-themed brunch blown away. couldn't have been more wrong! These delightful breakfast pastries light, soft, tender. mention that they're full festive flavor, thanks molasses gingerbread spices.
also feel pretty good about eating these tasty treats. were able make them without adding processed sugar, they taste sweet satisfying just like your favorite coffee shop treats. Even with swapping some healthy ingredients (like Greek yogurt, skim milk, coconut sugar) these pastries bake with crisp exterior moist, tender crumb inside. they're perfectly portion-sized, too. That's always good thing around holidays when need control sweet-tooth cravings.
Like said, gingerbread often gets overlooked this time year, thanks more-popular flavors Pumpkin Spice Lattes pecan pie. People still make gingerbread houses Christmas, don't think people baking flavors gingerbread which shame! It's time change that making these Gingerbread Scones friends family. They'll hooked after first bite, just like
Originally, people made gingerbread preserve ginger during Medieval European times. make cakes sweeter more edible, people started heavily flavoring cakes with molasses. This dark, sticky substance gives rich slightly smoky flavor cake, along with punch nutrition. Blackstrap molasses full vitamins minerals, too, like iron, vitamin selenium, magnesium. These days, it's also popular sweetener those with diabetes because helps stabilize blood sugar!
Eventually, gingerbread cakes turned into cookies, muffins, pies, more. They're most commonly found crackers build gingerbread houses during holidays, recent surge products making spicy cake trendy again. We're pretty happy about that, especially after eating these Gingerbread Scones.
Almost good scones topped with sugary glaze. It's usually sinfully sweet because it's little more than powdered sugar milk. wanted capture spirit glaze without putting anyone into diabetic shock. Luckily, Greek yogurt makes perfect substitute!
time whip tangy yogurt together with maple syrup vanilla extract, will completely transformed. will know used yogurt. have hard time finding plain Greek yogurt, feel free swap-in flavored varieties. find neutral flavors that will well with Gingerbread Scone, though, like vanilla, honey, coconut flavors.
large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, coconut sugar, ginger, cinnamon, cloves. Note: cups floor, then little time until makes cookie dough like consistency.
Grate butter grater into flour with your hands until mixture resembles lumpy, sand.
Gently molasses, yogurt, milk. Once mixture comes together, turn dough onto floured work surface gently knead using your hands until dough comes together.
Form dough into large circle about 1-inch deep. circle into equal slices.
Place slices prepared baking sheet bake minutes, until lightly browned outside. toothpick inserted into center scone should come clean.
Meanwhile, make drizzle whisking together remaining tablespoon Greek yogurt, maple syrup, vanilla extract small bowl. Transfer mixture pastry bag.
Allow scones cool minutes before drizzling glaze over scones.

substitutes coconut sugar? Wheat flour?
Diane, Cane sugar, date sugar, brown sugar will work. purpose flour will work place wheat.
please recommend best Gluten Free flour Gluten free flour blend recommendation rice flour though, blends that contain rice. *super* allergic rice....)that would work this recipe, those that have gluten free?
Alli, There aren't many without rice. found this brand all-purpose, gluten-free flour amazon.

Walt Disney Company Announces Intention Launch Tender Offer Remaining Euro Disney Shares mandatory buy-out threshold reached.
Walt Disney Company released Press Statement this morning advising Disney's intention purchase remaining shares Euro Disney S.C.A. support recapitalization €1.5 billion Euro Disney group companies enable Group continue implementation improvements Disneyland® Paris, reduce debt increase liquidity.
Walt Disney Company ("Disney") announces acquisition Kingdom Holding Company's ("Kingdom") interest Euro Disney S.C.A. ("Euro Disney"), representing Euro Disney's outstanding shares.
proposed transaction will increase Disney's interest Euro Disney 85.7% from 76.7%.
price transaction €2.00 share will paid shares Disney common stock.
Disney also announces intention make cash tender offer remaining outstanding shares Euro Disney price €2.00 share, representing premium Euro Disney's trading price close February 2017.
Subsequent completion tender offer, Disney committed support recapitalization €1.5 billion Euro Disney group companies ("Group") address Group's financial needs.
PARIS, Feb. 2017 Today Walt Disney Company ("Disney") announced that will acquire through subsidiaries Kingdom Holding Company's ("Kingdom") shares Euro Disney S.C.A. ("Euro Disney") price €2.00 share, increasing interest Euro Disney 85.7%. Disney also announced that this subsidiary intends make cash tender offer remaining outstanding shares Euro Disney price €2.00 share, representing premium trading price close February 2017. Moreover, Disney informed Euro Disney that committed support recapitalization €1.5 billion Euro Disney group companies ("Group") enable Group continue implementation improvements Disneyland® Paris, reduce debt increase liquidity.
Euro Disney remains listed company, Disney would expect recapitalization take form subscription applicable Disney subsidiaries their pro-rata share €1.23 billion rights offering Euro Disney together with backstop (and same price rights offering more such subsidiaries, ensuring that Euro Disney will able raise full amount contemplated rights offering, combined with direct €270 million cash investment equity level Euro Disney Associés S.C.A., main operating subsidiary Euro Disney, contribution proceeds rights offering Euro Disney Euro Disney Associés S.C.A. maintain ownership level Euro Disney Associés S.C.A. Euro Disney current 82%. Proceeds would used enable Group continue implementation improvements Disneyland Paris, repay most Group's indebtedness increase liquidity. rights offering described above would subject prior approval Euro Disney's shareholders shareholders' meeting.
Euro Disney delisted, Disney would expect recapitalization same amount also consist entirely equity contributions Group, allocation such contributions between Euro Disney subsidiaries could vary compared what described above. proceeds would used same purposes described above.
Walt Disney Company, together with subsidiaries affiliates, leading diversified international entertainment media enterprise with following business segments: media networks, parks resorts, studio entertainment, consumer products interactive media. Disney company annual revenues $55.6 billion Fiscal Year 2016.
Founded 1980, Kingdom Holding Company publicly traded company, which listed Tadawul (the Saudi Stock Exchange) 2007. Kingdom Holding Company world's most successful diversified business organizations, highly respected field investments recognized elite player regionally internationally.
Euro Disney S.C.A. holding company Euro Disney Associés S.C.A., primary operating company Disneyland® Paris. Disneyland Paris comprised Disneyland® Park, Walt Disney Studios® Park, seven themed hotels with approximately 5,800 rooms (excluding approximately 2,700 additional third-party rooms located site), convention centers, Disney Village®, dining, shopping entertainment center, golf courses. Euro Disney S.C.A. also responsible development 2,230-hectare property including surrounding Disneyland Paris. Euro Disney S.C.A.'s shares listed traded Euronext Paris.

Author Salon MickeyPosted February 2017 February 2017 Categories Disneyland ParisTags Euro Disney S.C.A., Euro Disney Supervisory Board, Recapitalisation, recapitalization, Star Tours, Walt Disney Company7 Comments Walt Disney Company Announces Intention Launch Tender Offer Remaining Euro Disney Shares mandatory buy-out threshold reached.
Kingdom Holding Participates Euro Disney recapitalization injecting €49.2 Million.
Kingdom Holding Company confirmed today November 2015) that they have fully participated Euro Disney S.C.A. Cash Tender Offer Anti Dilution Mechanism part recapitalization rights issue.
Saudi Arabian based Kingdom Holding Company chaired Prince Alwaleed Talal Abdulaziz Alsaud injected additional investment €49.2 million taking part Euro Disney S.C.A. financial recapitalization plan therefore Kingdom Holding Company maintains share Disneyland Paris.
Kingdom Holding Company with it's share resorts second largest shareholder after Walt Disney Company which owns 76.7% Disneyland Paris.
Euro Disney S.C.A. Shareholders Club wrote shareholders yesterday remind them commencement anti dilution mechanism part recapitalization plan which scheduled start October 2015 will last until November 2015.
anti dilution mechanism alows shareholders purchase additional shares from Euro Disney €1.25 share prorata what they owned February 2015.
annouced yesterday that Walt Disney Company 82.15% Euro Disney S.C.A. with holding 643,497,755 shares held it's three subsidiary companies Holding Company, EDLC SAS.
below publication, release distribution directly indirectly United States America, Canada, Australia Japan.
Euro Disney S.C.A. reminds shareholders possibility exercise, under certain conditions, right acquire Euro Disney S.C.A.'s shares, following mandatory simplified tender offer, within framework recapitalization plan.
Following completion Offer, final step implementation Euro Disney S.C.A. group's recapitalization plan announced October 2014, shareholders having status Eligible Shareholders defined below) have possibility exercise their rights acquire Company's shares (the "RAS").
(iii) October 2015, i.e., following date settlement delivery Offer positions October 2015 evening observable October 2015 morning).
further described below, number that will granted each Eligible Shareholder will rata shareholding Company's share capital.
information regarding both allocation exercise will provided each Eligible Shareholder authorized financial intermediary.
close trading Euronext yesterday September 2015) Walt Disney Company increased it's ownership Euro Disney S.C.A. 80.20%.
Walt Disney Company total 628,259,291 shares Disneyland Pairs through their subsidiary Holding Company LLC.
This increase rise 1.30% August 2015 when TWDC held 78.90% stake company. breakdown Euro Disney shareholders August 2015 available here.
With Phase Euro Disney S.C.A. Cash Tender Offer ending September 2015, results cash tender offer will released September 2015.
Phase will then begin days later will last days. Phase Euro Disney recapitalisation anti dilution mechanism, which gives shareholders right shares €1.25 proportion what they already own.
shares closed €1.31 Euronext yesturday.
Following ruling Paris Court Appeal September 2015 announced today document number 215C1279 that Phase Euro Disney S.C.A. public offering will closed September 2015.
AMF's decision follows Paris Appeal Courts rejection appeal made April CIMA (Charity Merger Arbitrage Fund) against decision made authorize Euro Disney mandatory cash tender offer which part Disneyland Paris recapitalization plan Walt Disney Company.
Euronext Paris will publish detailed timetable closure offer course.
Source: Association Petits Porteurs d'Actions EuroDisney.

Phase will then begin days later will last days. Phase Euro Disney recapitalisation anti dilution mechanism, which gives shareholders right shares €1.25 proportion what they already own.
shares closed €1.31 Euronext yesturday.
Following ruling Paris Court Appeal September 2015 announced today document number 215C1279 that Phase Euro Disney S.C.A. public offering will closed September 2015.
AMF's decision follows Paris Appeal Courts rejection appeal made April CIMA (Charity Merger Arbitrage Fund) against decision made authorize Euro Disney mandatory cash tender offer which part Disneyland Paris recapitalization plan Walt Disney Company.
Euronext Paris will publish detailed timetable closure offer course.
Source: Association Petits Porteurs d'Actions EuroDisney.
